column1: Xavier Edwards leads the way for Beat The Streak players today, bringing a steady bat and a prime leadoff role on the road with a strong 71.5% hit probability. He’s got the platoon advantage against Zack Littell and benefits from a favorable park, making him a top-tier pick for anyone chasing a streak. Joey Loperfido isn’t far behind, posting a 70.1% hit probability and offering a reliable profile in the heart of the order, also with the platoon edge and a good park boost. Brendan Donovan and Josh Naylor round out the list with top-of-order opportunities and favorable matchups, but Edwards stands a cut above with his combination of opportunity and matchup.
